MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William P. Klein, of Klein Law Group, Tel. 415.693.9107, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. DEFENDANT LAS MARGARITAS, INC., MIRTA SOSA Motion To Compel Responses is granted. Request For Monetary Sanctions is denied. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Off Calendar May-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Pfeilschiefter of McCormack & Erlich telephone number 415-296-8420 for Plaintiff Juan Mendoza.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that neither Juan Mendoza nor anyone else on his behalf was present. McCormack & Erlich LLP's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel of Record for PLAINTIFF JUAN MENDOZA is granted. Order signed in open Court.
